nodes.display_name: Mean and Median Income.Median equivalised net income
Mean and Median Income.Mean equivalised net income

nodes.expression:
VAR _satisfaction2024 = CALCULATE(AVERAGE('Life satisfaction'[Life satisfaction]), Years[Year] = 2024)
    VAR _satisfaction2013 = CALCULATE(AVERAGE('Life satisfaction'[Life satisfaction]), Years[Year] = 2013)
RETURN IF(_satisfaction2013 = BLANK() || _satisfaction2024 = BLANK(), BLANK(), _satisfaction2024 - _satisfaction2013)
CALCULATE(AVERAGE('Income Quantiles'[PPS]), 'Income Quantiles'[Quantile] = "Second quartile") / CALCULATE(AVERAGE('Income Quantiles'[PPS]), 'Income Quantiles'[Quantile] = "Ninety-ninth percentile")

nodes.display_name: Mean and Median Income.Median equalized net Income Males
nodes.expression: CALCULATE(AVERAGE('Mean and Median Income'[Median equivalised net income]), 'Mean and Median Income'[Sex] = "Males")

nodes.display_name: Mean and Median Income.Median equalized net Income Females
nodes.expression: CALCULATE( AVERAGE('Mean and Median Income'[Median equivalised net income]), 'Mean and Median Income'[Sex] = "Females")

nodes.display_name: Mean and Median Income.Median equalized net Income Total
nodes.expression: CALCULATE(AVERAGE('Mean and Median Income'[Median equivalised net income]), 'Mean and Median Income'[Sex] = "Total")
DIVIDE([New Hires YoY Var], [New Hires SPLY])
DIVIDE([Bad Hires YoY Var], [Bad Hires SPLY])

nodes.description: This pipeline ingests the clinical FHIR ndjson data into Delta tables in the bronze lakehouse. It then transforms and flattens the data from the bronze lakehouse to the silver lakehouse.

edges.evidence:
VAR _satisfaction2024 = CALCULATE(AVERAGE('Life satisfaction'[Life satisfaction]), Years[Year] = 2024)
    VAR _satisfaction2013 = CALCULATE(AVERAGE('Life satisfaction'[Life satisfaction]), Years[Year] = 2013)
RETURN IF(_satisfaction2013 = BLANK() || _satisfaction2024 = BLANK(), BLANK(), _satisfaction2024 - _satisfaction2013)

VAR _satisfaction2024 = CALCULATE(AVERAGE('Life satisfaction'[Life satisfaction]), Years[Year] = 2024)
    VAR _satisfaction2013 = CALCULATE(AVERAGE('Life satisfaction'[Life satisfaction]), Years[Year] = 2013)
RETURN IF(_satisfaction2013 = BLANK() || _satisfaction2024 = BLANK(), BLANK(), _satisfaction2024 - _satisfaction2013)
CALCULATE(AVERAGE('Income Quantiles'[PPS]), 'Income Quantiles'[Quantile] = "Second quartile") / CALCULATE(AVERAGE('Income Quantiles'[PPS]), 'Income Quantiles'[Quantile] = "Ninety-ninth percentile")
CALCULATE(AVERAGE('Income Quantiles'[PPS]), 'Income Quantiles'[Quantile] = "Second quartile") / CALCULATE(AVERAGE('Income Quantiles'[PPS]), 'Income Quantiles'[Quantile] = "Ninety-ninth percentile")
CALCULATE(AVERAGE('Mean and Median Income'[Median equivalised net income]), 'Mean and Median Income'[Sex] = "Males")
CALCULATE(AVERAGE('Mean and Median Income'[Median equivalised net income]), 'Mean and Median Income'[Sex] = "Males")
CALCULATE( AVERAGE('Mean and Median Income'[Median equivalised net income]), 'Mean and Median Income'[Sex] = "Females")
CALCULATE( AVERAGE('Mean and Median Income'[Median equivalised net income]), 'Mean and Median Income'[Sex] = "Females")
CALCULATE(AVERAGE('Mean and Median Income'[Median equivalised net income]), 'Mean and Median Income'[Sex] = "Total")
CALCULATE(AVERAGE('Mean and Median Income'[Median equivalised net income]), 'Mean and Median Income'[Sex] = "Total")
DIVIDE([New Hires YoY Var], [New Hires SPLY])
DIVIDE([Bad Hires YoY Var], [Bad Hires SPLY])
DIVIDE([Bad Hires YoY Var], [Bad Hires SPLY])
